evals.name: generate-image
evals.prompt: Generate an image for me: a red panda wearing headphones, coding at a desk at night, neon lighting. I want it at 2K resolution. Give me the final image URL when it's ready.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovers and runs the kie-cli image command (e.g. nano_banana_image) with the prompt and 2K resolution, uses --json, captures the task id, polls get_task_status until done, and reports the resulting image URL.

evals.name: check-tasks
evals.prompt: Can you check my recent Kie.ai generations and tell me their status?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `kie-cli list_tasks --json` (and/or get_task_status) and summarizes the recent tasks and their statuses. No new generation is started.

evals.name: select-avatar-tool
evals.prompt: I have a portrait photo (https://example.com/face.jpg) and a short script I want the person to say. I want a talking-avatar video via Kie.ai where they lip-sync my script. Which exact command and flags should I use? You don't need to run the full video job, just figure out the right tool and its parameters.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses `kie-cli --help` and `kie-cli <tool> --help` to identify the correct lip-sync/avatar tool (kling_avatar or infinitalk_lip_sync) and lists the exact flags (image/photo URL, audio or script, etc.). Does not need to run a real generation.
